basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 April 2026 on the official website of TISS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years Age Relaxation: The institute reserves the right to relax any of the qualification/experience/age limit in exceptional cases, or in case of person already holding analogous position in Government Department/Research and Academic Institution/Industry.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.
qualification.details: Consultant : Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent. Minimum 25 years of experience in planning, execution, and supervision of civil works in Government / Semi-Government / Autonomous organizations. Held the position of Executive Engineer or above in CPWD or equivalent organization. Experience in handling multi-storied institutional, residential, or public infrastructure projects. Knowledge of CPWD manuals, government procurement procedures, and contract management systems.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS CONSULTANT – IDS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS CONSULTANT – IDS recruitment is 10-05-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the CONSULTANT – IDS post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the CONSULTANT – IDS post as per the official notification released by TISS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the CONSULTANT – IDS position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent. Additionally, significant experience in civil works and relevant organizational positions is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the CONSULTANT – IDS post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the CONSULTANT – IDS post is 64 years. The institute may consider age relaxation in exceptional cases.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the CONSULTANT – IDS role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the CONSULTANT – IDS position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the TISS CONSULTANT – IDS recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official TISS website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for TISS CONSULTANT – IDS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category: Rs. 1,000/- for General/OBC, Rs. 250/- for SC/ST, and Nil for Women candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Shortlisting of applications, followed by a Personal Interaction, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the CONSULTANT – IDS post is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
